description_long: This object is a chessboard set on a square base with a checkered playing surface composed of alternating light and dark squares. The board is surrounded by a thick, raised border in a rich brown color, giving it a sturdy and defined edge. Numerous cylindrical chess pieces of varying heights and designs are positioned on the board, with some pieces featuring colored bands—red or blue—near their bases for differentiation. The chess pieces are minimalist and modern in style, with some having notched tops or pointed features, and are primarily gray or white in color. The board is placed on a flat, olive-green mat, which provides a contrasting background. The overall appearance is clean and geometric, with a focus on functional design and clear visual separation between the board, pieces, and surrounding area.
description: A modern chessboard with a brown border, checkered playing surface, and minimalist cylindrical chess pieces in gray and white, accented with colored bands. The board sits on an olive-green mat, creating a visually distinct and organized setup.
description_view_0: Front view showing the chessboard with most pieces visible, highlighting the brown border and the arrangement of pieces with colored bands.
description_view_1: Rear view with a clearer look at the taller chess pieces and the distribution of pieces across the board, as well as the olive-green mat.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the height differences among the chess pieces and the checkered pattern of the board.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the arrangement of pieces from another angle, with the colored bands on the pieces more visible.
attribute_board_pattern: The playing surface features a classic checkered pattern with alternating light and dark squares arranged in a regular grid. The squares are uniform in size and shape, forming a visually balanced and traditional chessboard layout. The border is distinctly raised and colored brown, providing a clear separation from the playing area.
attribute_border_design: The border is a wide, raised frame in a solid brown color, made to resemble wood. It is smooth, unornamented, and provides a sturdy edge around the playing area, with no visible inscriptions or decorative markings.
